name: Hitomi (ASTRO-H)
tagline: Spun apart in orbit; loss drove XRISM development
description: JAXA’s X-ray observatory, lost just 38 days after launch in February 2016. A reaction-wheel saturation triggered a sequence of attitude-control errors that spun the spacecraft so fast it broke apart. Lessons drove the development of XRISM (launched 2023).
best_known_for: Spun apart in orbit; loss drove XRISM development
